From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[alma mater](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/alma_mater "wiktionary:alma mater")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

***[Alma mater](/wiki/Alma_mater "Alma mater")*** is an allegorical Latin phrase for a university or college.

**Alma mater** may also refer to:

## Organizations

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alma_mater_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Organizations")]

* [Alma Mater Society of Queen's University](/wiki/Alma_Mater_Society_of_Queen%27s_University "Alma Mater Society of Queen's University"), the central undergraduate student government of Queen's University in Kingston, Ontario, Canada
* [Alma Mater Society of the University of British Columbia](/wiki/Alma_Mater_Society_of_the_University_of_British_Columbia "Alma Mater Society of the University of British Columbia"), the complete student government of the University of British Columbia, Vancouver, Canada

## Universities

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alma_mater_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Universities")]

* [Alma Mater Europaea](/wiki/Alma_Mater_Europaea "Alma Mater Europaea"), an international university founded by the European Academy of Sciences and Arts, with headquarters in Salzburg, Austria
* Alma Mater Studiorum ("Nourishing mother of studies"), the name of the [University of Bologna](/wiki/University_of_Bologna "University of Bologna"), Italy

## Art, entertainment, and media

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alma_mater_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Art, entertainment, and media")]

### Music

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alma_mater_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Music")]

#### School songs

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alma_mater_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: School songs")]

* [Alma mater (song)](/wiki/Alma_mater_(song) "Alma mater (song)"), the official song or anthem of a school, college, or university
* ["Alma Mater" (Dartmouth College)](/wiki/Alma_Mater_(Dartmouth_College) "Alma Mater (Dartmouth College)"), the official school song of Dartmouth College, New Hampshire, US
* "Hail Alma Mater", the informal title of "Marquette University Anthem," a formal school song of [Marquette University](/wiki/Marquette_University "Marquette University"), Wisconsin, US
* "Hail Alma Mater", a formal school song of [McGill University](/wiki/McGill_University "McGill University"), Montreal, Quebec, Canada
* "[University of Pittsburgh Alma Mater](/wiki/University_of_Pittsburgh_Alma_Mater "University of Pittsburgh Alma Mater")", an official song of the University of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, US

#### Albums

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alma_mater_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Albums")]

* [*Alma Mater* (Pope Benedict XVI album)](/wiki/Alma_Mater_(Pope_Benedict_XVI_album) "Alma Mater (Pope Benedict XVI album)"), 2009
* [*Alma Mater* (Stockholm Monsters album)](/wiki/Alma_Mater_(Stockholm_Monsters_album) "Alma Mater (Stockholm Monsters album)"), 1984
* *Alma Mater*, a 2000 Portuguese album and song by [Rodrigo Leão](/wiki/Rodrigo_Le%C3%A3o "Rodrigo Leão")

#### Recorded songs

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alma_mater_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Recorded songs")]

* "Alma Mater", a song on the 1972 album *[School's Out](/wiki/School%27s_Out_(album) "School's Out (album)")* by Alice Cooper
* "Alma Mater", a song on B-side of the 1972 single *[Saturday in the Park](/wiki/Saturday_in_the_Park_(song) "Saturday in the Park (song)")* by Chicago
* "Alma Mater", a song from *[Carrie (musical)](/wiki/Carrie_(musical) "Carrie (musical)")* (1988)
* "Alma Mater" ("Альма-матер"), a 1991 Russian song by [Viktor Berkovsky](/wiki/Viktor_Berkovsky "Viktor Berkovsky")
* "Alma Mater", a song on the 1995 album *[Wolfheart](/wiki/Wolfheart "Wolfheart")* by Moonspell
* "Alma Mater", a song on the 2018 album *[Time Will Die and Love Will Bury It](/wiki/Time_Will_Die_and_Love_Will_Bury_It "Time Will Die and Love Will Bury It")* by Rolo Tomassi
* "[Alma Matters](/wiki/Alma_Matters "Alma Matters")", a 1997 single by Morrissey

### Film, television, and theatre

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alma_mater_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Film, television, and theatre")]

* [*Alma Mater* (film)](/wiki/Alma_Mater_(film) "Alma Mater (film)"), a 2004 Uruguayan film, nominated to the Goya Award for Best Iberoamerican Film
* [*Alma Mater* (play)](/wiki/Alma_Mater_(play) "Alma Mater (play)"), a 1971 BBC *Play for Today*
* *Alma Mater*, a 2002 American film directed by [Hans Canosa](/wiki/Hans_Canosa "Hans Canosa")
* "[Chuck Versus the Alma Mater](/wiki/Chuck_Versus_the_Alma_Mater "Chuck Versus the Alma Mater")" (2007), season 1, episode 7 of the television series, *Chuck*
* *Alma Mater*, a 1934 ballet composed by [Kay Swift](/wiki/Kay_Swift "Kay Swift") for George Balanchine
* *[Alma Matters: Inside the IIT Dream](/wiki/Alma_Matters:_Inside_the_IIT_Dream "Alma Matters: Inside the IIT Dream")*, a 2021 Indian docu-series

### Visual arts

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alma_mater_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Visual arts")]

* [*Alma Mater* (Illinois sculpture)](/wiki/Alma_Mater_(Illinois_sculpture) "Alma Mater (Illinois sculpture)"), a 1929 sculpture by Lorado Taft on the University of Illinois campus in Urbana, Illinois, US
* [*Alma Mater* (New York sculpture)](/wiki/Alma_Mater_(New_York_sculpture) "Alma Mater (New York sculpture)"), a 1903 sculpture by Daniel Chester French on the Columbia University campus in New York City, New York, US
* [*Alma Mater* (Missouri sculpture)](/wiki/Alma_Mater_(Missouri_sculpture) "Alma Mater (Missouri sculpture)"), a 1916 three-figure sculpture by Cyrus E. Dallin on the campus of Mary Institute and St. Louis Country Day School in Ladue, Missouri, US
* *Alma Mater*, a painting in a 1909–1916 series by [Edvard Munch](/wiki/Edvard_Munch "Edvard Munch"), for the University of Oslo

### Other media

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alma_mater_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Other media")]

* *Alma Mater*, an academic publication produced by [Jagiellonian University](/wiki/Jagiellonian_University "Jagiellonian University"), Kraków, Poland
* [*Alma Mater* (role-playing game)](/wiki/Alma_Mater_(role-playing_game) "Alma Mater (role-playing game)"), a 1982 role-playing game

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Alma_mater_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* *Alma mater*, the title of a [papal bull](/wiki/Papal_bull "Papal bull") issued by Pope Clement V on April 4, 1310
